description: CompositionMulti-coloured V-neck top made of 100% viscose, has short sleeves with graphic print all overFittingRegularWash careMachine or hand wash separatelyUse mild detergent onlyDo not bleach or wringUse mild detergent onlyDry in shadeMedium ironColour those dull days with splashes of brightness and lovely Japanese print with this Jelous 21 top. Team this with jeans, shorts or skirts and stylish flip flops available at myntra for that summery look.Model's statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.7", Chest-33", Waist-25"
